title: circaea lutetiana var. minor
intro: Circaea lutetiana var. minor, also known as the small enchanter's nightshade or small wood sorrel, is a plant species that belongs to the family Gyrostemoneae and is a variant of the Circaea lutetiana. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Circaea lutetiana var. minor include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to make teas, salves, and other topical applications.
